title: B17 ApplicabilityGate: dry-run patch applicability checking (WP-T2A)

arbiter_disposition.adversarial_break1_cross_request_race: ACCEPTED — process-level path-keyed lock registry (_PATH_LOCKS) serializes all gate.check() calls across requests for the same repo
arbiter_disposition.adversarial_break2_always_detaches_head: ACCEPTED — save branch name via head.ref.name when not detached; restore by branch name preserves HEAD attachment
arbiter_disposition.adversarial_break4_saved_commit_unbound: ACCEPTED — initialized saved_ref='' and wrapped current_commit() in try/except before try/finally block
arbiter_disposition.adversarial_break8_frozen_list_defaults: ACCEPTED — field(default_factory=list) for all list fields in frozen ApplicabilityResult
arbiter_disposition.architect_concern1_dir_none: ACCEPTED — applied the spec-required dir=None fix to _git_apply in manager.py
arbiter_disposition.architect_concern2_per_patch_false_negat: ACCEPTED — documented in gate.py module docstring
arbiter_disposition.risk_validation_test22_schema: ACCEPTED — dropped baseline_ref from summary dict (4-key schema)
arbiter_disposition.risk_validation_tests5_6_inconsistency: ACCEPTED — degrade paths return BEFORE try/finally block, consistent with call_count assertions

defects_fixed: _git_apply temp file written inside git working tree (dir=self._cfg.repo_path → dir=None)
